creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi J.,

since you sent your problem report [1], the port's maintainer has sent a
followup, and net/freeradius2 has been updated. Could you please let us
know if you're still seeing the problem with the most recent version of
the port?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144801
